feed.title: Current Watches, Warnings and Advisories for New Zealand issued by MetService
feed.rights: Copyright Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited, 2026. Licensed under Creative Commons BY 4.0.

entry.title: Road Snowfall Warning
entry.summary: A few snow showers are possible above 800 metres but little snow, if any, is expected to settle on the road.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Road Snowfall Warning
entry.summary: 3 to 6 cm of snow may settle about Homer Tunnel, possibly more with thunderstorms.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Strong Wind Watch
entry.summary: West to southwest winds may approach severe gale in exposed places. Winds ease across Southland and Stewart Island from mid-morning. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: Moderate.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited
